content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 58.5 lbs **가치:** 40 GP --- 예능인의 꾸러미에는 다음 물품들이 포함됩니다: [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [침낭](/212f7f5a1e80811b9a62d2dc4dadb75f?pvs=25), [종](/212f7f5a1e8081ecb643e0ab7a9461ca?pvs=25), [망원 랜턴](/212f7f5a1e8081d18ac0c35d4fdfce78?pvs=25), [무대 의상 ](/212f7f5a1e80810fb791f36673f07135?pvs=25)3벌, [거울](/212f7f5a1e80816fb665e19fc63c2232?pvs=25), [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25) 8병, 9일분의 [휴대식량](/212f7f5a1e808112b5ecfacc3de52b5a?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25), [가죽물통](/212f7f5a1e80815da95ac2b204f7677f?pvs=25).
